title: Device Home Screen - Battery life
scenario: Device Home Screen battery display shows greyed-out icons with last known percentage when headset is powered off
steps: Observe battery icon display for a headset (single icon)
Observe battery icon display for a headset with charging case (two icons: 'H' and 'C')
Observe battery icon display for earbuds (three icons: 'L', 'R', and 'C')
Check battery icon color at 100%-40% charge level (black in light mode, white in dark mode)
Check battery icon color at 39%-20% charge level (yellow)
Check battery icon color at 19%-1% charge level (red)
Check battery icon color at 0% charge level (empty icon)
Turn off the headset and observe battery icons (greyed out with last known percentage displayed)
expected:
- Headset: single battery icon displayed
- Headset with charging case: two icons marked "H" (headset) and "C" (case) displayed
- Earbuds: three icons marked "L" (left), "R" (right), and "C" (case) displayed
- Battery icon colors: 100%-40% = black (white in dark mode), 39%-20% = yellow, 19%-1% = red, 0% = empty icon
- When headset is turned off: battery icons are greyed out with last known percentage displayed
